## How I tested it

<!-- Commands you ran and what you observed. New behavior should come with a test. -->

```
make ci
```

## Checklist

- [ ] `make ci` is green locally (build · clippy · test · doc · web · audit · smoke)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Did **not** run `cargo fmt` (this repo is hand-formatted)
- [ ] Updated docs/README if behavior changed
- [ ] PR title follows conventional commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …)
